case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT INC. VS. ROLANDO B PONCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PONCE, ROLANDO B $8,669.78 PRINCIPAL, $315.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,985.68, SEE SCANNED DOC
